# SDAP (S&D Asia Pacific)
> Bespoke Luxury Metalworks — Precision Industrial Hardware | https://jeansbutton.pro/

SDAP is a Jiaxing-based bespoke hardware manufacturer (est. 2007) supplying precision-engineered metal components to European luxury fashion houses, Swiss motorsport leaders, and premium denim labels worldwide. Our manufacturing capabilities span 5-axis CNC milling, High-Vacuum PVD coating, cold-forging, and soft-touch TPU overmoulding across six core product verticals.

## Product Portfolio

- [Tack Buttons & Shanks](https://jeansbutton.pro/tack-buttons.html): Zamak 5 die-cast and H65 Brass forged tack buttons. High-Vacuum PVD coating (2500–3000 HV), ASTM B117 120h pass, Oeko-Tex Standard 100 Class I, detachable mono-material for circular economy compliance. Optional soft-touch TPU/TPE rubber overmoulding with skin-grade GB/T 17592 certification.
- [Copper Rivets & Burrs](https://jeansbutton.pro/rivets.html): Cold-forged H65 Structural Brass with 35% elongation index (ASTM E8). 5-axis CNC micro-milling (±0.005 mm), ISO 9227 salt spray 96h pass, >850 N load rating.
- [Structural Identifiers / Patches](https://jeansbutton.pro/patches.html): Cellulose Jacron, vulcanized cork, and Mycelium (mushroom) leather substrates. 100-ton hydraulic cold-press embossing, ISO 3377-2 tear resistance, 600 DPI laser etching, PETA-approved vegan.
- [Luxury Bag Hardware](https://jeansbutton.pro/bags.html): AISI 316L marine-grade stainless steel clasps and D-rings. Electropolished mirror finish, corrosion-rated IP67 equivalent, 2000 N pull-strength tested.
- [Cigar Humidor Accessories](https://jeansbutton.pro/cigars.html): 6061-T6 aerospace aluminum hinges and hermetic brass locks. ±0.01 mm precision tolerancing, 99.5% airtight RH seal integrity, cedar-compatible passivation.
- [Fine Jewelry Metalworks](https://jeansbutton.pro/jewelry.html): Platinum 950 prong settings and 18K gold vermeil components. Zaratsu hand-polishing, 0.001 mm gemstone culet tolerance, hallmarked to ISO 9202.

## Technology Capabilities
- High-Vacuum PVD (Physical Vapor Deposition): molecularly bonded finish, 10× superior to electroplating, zero liquid discharge
- 5-Axis CNC Micro-Milling: ±0.005 mm tolerance, bespoke monogramming
- Cold-Forging: H65 Brass 35% elongation index, structural integrity for heavyweight denim
- Soft-Touch TPU/TPE Overmoulding: skin-grade tactile surface, ±0.02 mm thickness tolerance
- Zaratsu Mirror Polishing: Japanese hand-finishing for fine jewelry components
- Circular Economy Hardware: detachable mono-material tack buttons; conforms to Ellen MacArthur Foundation standards

## Company
- Founded: 2007
- Headquarters: Jiaxing, Zhejiang, China
- Markets: European luxury fashion, Swiss motorsport, premium denim, cigar lifestyle, fine jewelry
- Certifications: Oeko-Tex Standard 100, ISO 9227, ASTM B117, PETA-approved vegan, GB/T 17592
